meta.name: MagnetaServiceFee — accept ownership (plasma)
meta.description: Second leg of Ownable2Step: Safe 0xC4c96aF54cdE078dc993d6948199b0AF8cD6717a accepts ownership of MagnetaServiceFee 0xFf08089D777fe9506a245F0Bada18e1ec0382f3E on plasma. Run AFTER deployServiceFee.ts (transferOwnership already done by deployer). Fees are OFF (opFee=0) until a later setOpFee.
